provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, compact hand crossbow, dark walnut wood stock with a smooth contour, bronze trigger mechanism and latch, steel prod arms with taut string, a single iron bolt loaded in the channel, small and elegant proportions suggesting a one-handed weapon, warm wood tones against cool metal parts
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: A bolt-action rifle or musket with dark wood stock. Not a crossbow at all. Good execution of the wrong item.
